form.formComment: Won her last two including a strong win last start over 350m at Murray Bridge Straight by 1.3 lengths in a Grade 6. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Impressive performance leading throughout to score by 2.5 lengths in a Grade 6 last start at Angle Park, recording a swift 30.51 over the 530m journey. Top win and looms as a strong winning chance.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (31.68) when seventh over 530m at Angle Park in a Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed five times. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (30.93) at big odds over 530m at Angle Park. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Angle Park (30.94) in a Grade 6, finishing a one length fourth. Has two successes and four minors from nine starts from box 7. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start by a nose at Angle Park (30.99) beating Quick Strike in a Grade 6 on April 2. Holds top-three claims.
